text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin isn't feeling very<n>motivated, so I
take her to a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We pray and draw our fortunes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering where you were<n>taking me, but a
shrine? Really?
choice_data_list: I thought it would make you feel better.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If wishes really came true soeasily, there would be literally nomore suffering in the—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hang on... Taishin?! Is that you?<n>Heeeey!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, you two came to pray too?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We're about to leave. We already<n>prayed and got
our fortunes and<n>everything.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Don't go yet! Do it again<n>so we can
make a wish together!<n>Please? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Praying twice is better than once, and<n>doing it
three times is even better!<n>The more you pray, the
more likely<n>your wish'll come true!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At Winning Ticket's insistence, we<n>get back in line
to pray.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, gods—and the Buddha too! Grant<n>my wiiiish!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is a Shinto shrine, Ticket. The<n>Buddha isn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Why the heck am I even doing this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what fortunes did everyone get?<n>I got "good
fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I got "modest fortune." Not bad. What<n>about you,
Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I got "great fortune."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not like it's super rare or<n>anything.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! Not everyone has<n>great luck, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If you combine it with my good luck<n>and
Hayahide's modest luck, your<n>wish will definitely
come true!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll feel totally better in no<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I suppose we should tell you. We<n>actually
came here to pray for your<n>good health.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We want to race you when you're in<n>top fighting
shape after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Did you two really...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, who asked you to do that?! You<n>boneheads!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, it seems like their wishes<n>come true
with Narita Taishin making<n>a full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I got "great misfortune."

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah! They say you always get<n>a "great
fortune" after drawing that<n>one!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However... it appears that they've<n>run out of
fortunes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Does that mean Taishin's<n>stuck with
the worst possible luck?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't really care, actually...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But you should care! Oh, poorTaishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez... Shut up already! And stop<n>crying!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though she's able to calm Winning<n>Ticket
afterward, Narita Taishin's<n>condition unfortunately
doesn't<n>improve.
